2026-04-06T23:57:18.4732201Z   
2026-04-06T23:57:18.4732484Z   1. **`StructuredInputDefinition`** - A new public class with properties:
2026-04-06T23:57:18.4732926Z      - `Description`: A human-readable description of the input
2026-04-06T23:57:18.4733291Z      - `DefaultValue`: The default value for the input
2026-04-06T23:57:18.4733618Z      - `Schema`: JSON schema for the structured input
2026-04-06T23:57:18.4734006Z      - `IsRequired`: Whether the input is required (in factory method only)
2026-04-06T23:57:18.4734603Z      
2026-04-06T23:57:18.4734797Z      This is not documented in the README.
2026-04-06T23:57:18.4735039Z

2026-04-06T23:57:18.4736202Z      
2026-04-06T23:57:18.4737201Z   3. The CHANGELOG for `2.1.0-beta.1` is empty and needs to list these new APIs, plus there are no samples demonstrating how to use structured inputs with declarative agents. The README covers basic agent types but doesn't address structured inputs or prompt template substitution at all.
2026-04-06T23:57:18.4738242Z   
2026-04-06T23:57:18.4738681Z   I should file this against `Azure.AI.Projects.Agents` since that's where the most significant user-facing API changes are.
